question: In Unity, which MonoBehaviour lifecycle method is called first: Awake or Start? Answer with one word.
In Unity, what is the name of the MonoBehaviour callback that runs at a fixed timestep and is the correct place to apply Rigidbody forces? Answer with the method name only.
Which MonoBehaviour method starts a coroutine? Answer with the method name only.
Which class do you 'yield return new' to wait for a given number of seconds inside a Unity coroutine (scaled time)? Class name only.
What does GetComponent<T>() return when the component is not present on the GameObject? One word.
Which preprocessor symbol wraps code that must only compile in the Unity Editor? Symbol only.
Name the 3D physics callback invoked when a non-trigger collider first touches another collider. Method name only.
Name the 3D physics callback invoked when a collider first enters a trigger volume. Method name only.
Which C# attribute exposes a private field in the Unity Inspector? Attribute name only, without brackets.
Which Time property gives the frame delta time unaffected by Time.timeScale? Property name only.
Which Vector3 property returns the vector with magnitude 1 (without modifying the original)? Property name only.
Which MonoBehaviour callback is invoked when the object is being destroyed? Method name only.
Which SceneManager method loads a scene by name or build index? Method name only.
In a fresh Unity project, what is the default fixed timestep in seconds (the value of Time.fixedDeltaTime)? Number only.
Which MonoBehaviour callback runs after all Update calls each frame (commonly used for camera follow)? Method name only.
Which attribute forces a component to be added together with required component types, e.g. ensuring a Rigidbody exists? Attribute name only, without brackets.
